transcript: today I'm going to be making a few beats using an AI plugin called Melody sauce 2 by Eva beat this plugin easily generates ideas for Melodies and beats using Ai and there are so many combinations and sounds and it's just so much fun to use I've had it for a few days and I'm really enjoying it what I like about this plugin and I'll obviously get into that in this video but I've like some AI tools for producers they just like generate the entire beat for you and there's no fun and there's no creativity involved I find that with this plugin it's really quick to get get the idea and then you can make the beat like for me as a producer I'm someone who like you know as soon as I hear like maybe a a chord progression or even like sometimes like a specific sound or a specific just a couple of notes it gives me an idea for basically how to make the entire beat and what I love about this plug-in Melody sauce 2 it gives me that idea like easily so I get the initial idea and then I can make the whole beat around it so it just it speeds up my workflow and it gives me these ideas easily and uh yeah I'll show you guys how to use it if you're interested in getting
